---
title: "Sources of evidence from which to evaluate SPI-M"
format: html
---

### Data

- EMRG consensus statements: https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/consensus-statements-on-covid-19 
- R and growth rate from May 2020: https://assets.publishing.service.gov.uk/media/63a46e3ed3bf7f375c7d833d/221221_R_and_growth_rate_time_series_for_publication_v1.0.ods


- https://www.ons.gov.uk/peoplepopulationandcommunity/healthandsocialcare/conditionsanddiseases/bulletins/coronaviruscovid19infectionsurveypilot/latest
- https://coronavirus.data.gov.uk/

### Metadata

each model
- https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/reproduction-number-r-and-growth-rate-methodology/reproduction-number-r-and-growth-rate-methodology

### Process

- Political landscape
  - Hine report & post-swine flu inquiry
  - COVID Inquiriy witness statements & testimony
    - https://covid19.public-inquiry.uk/documents/
    - 1920 individual documents
    - 12548 collected evidence
    - 6 reports (to date)
    - 21 Every Story Matters records
  - Hansard  
  - Freedom of Information requests e.g. internal Pegasus evaluation
  - Overton
  - News media

- Academic landscape
    - Publications 
    - Citation networks
